channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Syria delays first session of transitional parliament without explanation
item.description: The transitional parliament aims to draft a new elections law during its 30-month term.

item.title: Charles Leclerc wins F1 British Grand Prix behind the safety car
item.description: Charles Leclerc collects his first victory of the 2026 F1 season after late safety car confusion in the final laps.

item.title: Photo of abused Palestinian detainee causes anguish for two Gaza mothers
item.description: Disturbing image showing restrained detainee adds to agony of two mothers, each of whom is certain he is their son.

item.title: Cape Verde celebrates team’s return after historic World Cup
item.description: Cape Verde's football team is getting a hero's welcome on its return home after a historic World Cup run.

item.title: Extreme weather disrupts US’s 250th anniversary celebrations
item.description: Extreme weather disrupted the US’s 250th anniversary celebrations, forcing evacuations, cancellations and delays.

item.title: Millions attend funeral prayers for Iran’s Khamenei and family
item.description: Millions of people have attended funeral prayers in Tehran for Iran's late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.

item.title: Houthi rebels kill 16 Yemeni government troops in fiercest clashes in years
item.description: Medical sources on the Red Sea coast report 16 dead from pro-government forces and 22 wounded.

item.title: Dr Hussam Abu Safia’s life in ‘grave danger’
item.description: ‘This is the last time you'll see me.’

item.title: What to know about the renewed coordinated attacks across Mali
item.description: Separatist Tuareg-led group and regional al-Qaeda affiliate have claimed responsibility for attacks on army positions.

item.title: Indonesian army recovers US pilot’s body from Papua
item.description: Indonesian troops have recovered the body of American pilot Nicholas Goselin from the restive Papua region.

item.title: Jailed Gaza hospital chief in life-threatening condition, rights group says
item.description: Elyas Abu Safia says his father Hussam can barely breathe or speak after more than 555 days in Israeli prison.

item.title: Sooryavanshi sets record for youngest India player in international match
item.description: Fifteen-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi became the youngest debutant for India in a T20 loss to England at Old Trafford.

item.title: Trump praises US military as it marks 250 years of independence
item.description: Trump praises US military as it marks 250 years of independence

item.title: China and Russia to hold annual joint naval drills
item.description: Exercises from Monday to July 13 off Qingdao to be followed by joint maritime patrols in the Pacific Ocean.

item.title: Release Dr Hussam Abu Safia immediately!
item.description: It’s been more than 1,000 days of genocide and 500 days of Abu Safia’s detention. We need urgent action to end both.

item.title: Mexico vs England: FIFA World Cup last 16 – Kane, prediction and altitude
item.description: One of the most anticipated knockout matches takes place when Mexico plays England at the Azteca in the round of 16.

item.title: Reform UK’s Farage failed to disclose funds from convicted criminal: Report
item.description: George Cottrell provided funds for Reform UK leader's security, drivers, staff and accommodation, Sunday Times reports.

item.title: How xenophobia went viral in South Africa
item.description: The online campaign stoking South Africa's latest xenophobic backlash.

item.title: FIFA World Cup round of 16: Bracket, schedule, predictions and latest news
item.description: Second round of knockout matches features Brazil vs Norway, Mexico vs England. We have predictions and the latest news.

item.title: China releases underground church pastor after months in detention
item.description: Ezra Jin’s family says the Zion Church founder arrived in the US after months in detention in China.

item.title: Watch World Cup Day 24: France and Morocco advance to quarterfinals
item.description: Latest match highlights, reaction and previews from the FIFA World Cup 2026 in North America.

item.title: Palestinians in Gaza celebrate Morocco’s World Cup victory
item.description: Palestinians in Gaza celebrate Morocco's World Cup victory

item.title: Iran’s China envoy vows ‘special’ Hormuz treatment for ‘friendly’ countries
item.description: Despite US objections, ambassador insists new fees to be charged to vessels transiting Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Trump offers to help end Russia-Ukraine war in Putin call, Kremlin says
item.description: Kremlin aide Yury Ushakov says Trump made the offer during a nearly 90-minute phone call with the Russian president.

item.title: Egypt and Morocco fans celebrate World Cup wins by singing for Palestine
item.description: Egypt and Morocco fans celebrated their World Cup success by singing ‘My Blood is Palestinian’ at a Dallas fan zone.
